chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1286 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.5484/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 29.02.2024 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioners, claiming to be employees of Highways Division, District Sukkur, working as Chowkidars, Helper and Beldar, have filed this petition for release of salaries. Comments have been filed by respondents No.3 and 8 today, and the relevant officials are also present and state that all the documents filed by the petitioners are fake, bogus and fabricated. They were never appointed in the Highways Department. It is clear that by using these fake documents, the petitioners have attempted to obtain an order from this Court for a relief to which they are not entitled in law. More so, by filing fake documents, they have tried to mislead the Court. In view of above, this petition is dismissed along with listed application, and the case of the petitioners is referred to Anti- Corruption Establishment, Sukkur for holding an enquiry, in which if the allegations against them are found correct, to take action against them in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
